name: ModelObjectSelector
summary: The ModelObjectSelector class can be used to select objects from the Tekla Structures user interface. Currently, these selections both select the objects from the database and highlight them visually.

constructors.name: ModelObjectSelector
constructors.summary: Creates a new model object selector instance.

methods.name: GetObjectsByBoundingBox
methods.signature: public ModelObjectEnumerator GetObjectsByBoundingBox(Point MinPoint, Point MaxPoint, View View)
methods.summary: Returns an enumerator of the given view's visible model objects that collide with the given geometrical bounding box. Note that this method uses approximate bounding boxes and thus is NOT EXACT, and may return objects not necessarily colliding with the given box but only being somewhere near to it.

params.name: MinPoint
params.doc: The minimum point of the bounding box.

params.name: MaxPoint
params.doc: The maximum point of the bounding box.

params.name: View
params.doc: The view to get the objects from.

returns.doc: A model object enumerator of the visible model objects colliding with the given bounding box.

methods.name: GetSelectedObjects
methods.summary: Returns an enumerator of all the selected model objects in the model view.

returns.doc: A model object enumerator of all the selected model objects.

methods.name: Select(ArrayList)
methods.summary: Selects a list of objects from the user interface.

params.name: ModelObjects
params.doc: The list of model objects to select.

methods.name: Select(ArrayList, Boolean)
methods.signature: public bool Select(ArrayList ModelObjects, bool ShowDimensions)
methods.summary: Selects a list of objects from the user interface.

params.name: ModelObjects
params.doc: The list of model objects to select.

params.name: ShowDimensions
params.doc: Defines whether to show dimensions of the parts in the selection.
